description: Style Noteadrika captures the mood of the moment with this statement piece designed to snazz up any outfit. Keep the rest of your accessories minimal for maximum impact and style this with a monochrome top. Product DetailsOrange and red fabric covered beads with wooden discs Beads connect to a satin tape that culminates in a lobster claspMaterial and CareWooden beadsWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirtSizeLength: 58 cm
